---
title: "Configuration Files and Workflows"
listing:
  contents:
    - ../../posts/personal_website_configuration/index.md
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
image: thumbnail.png
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
description: "Posts relating to my personal workflows and system configurations for various programs."
---
